case_title: IDIART, JEAN-EMILE vs. CLARKE, JOHN W.

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-27-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01

JUDGE PRO TEM:SCOTT WEAVER;CLERK:ECLAVERIA;RPTR:DIANA PADILLA 5:00PM: C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PRESENT WERE BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFT AND BOTH WERE REPRESENTING THEMSELVES. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS OF SETTLEMENT ON RECORD,AS FOLLOWS (JUDGE STATED THE TERMS FOR THE RECORD): JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF TO HAVE POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT ROOM 23, THE BASQUE HOTEL, 17 ROMOLO PLACE, SF,CA. EXECUTION STAYED TO MAY 31,1995, WITH NO FURTHER STAYS; RENT AND DAMAGES WAIVED BY PLFF;SECURITY DEPOSIT WAIVED BY DEFENDNAT AND ALL COSTS AND ATTY FEES WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES PLFF PREPARES STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND DEFT WILL SIGN. IF THERE IS A PROBLEM, EACH PARTY TO CONTACT PRO TEM JUDGE.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IDIART, JEAN-EMILE AS TO DEFENDANT CLARKE, JOHN W. SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT CLARKE, JOHN W.
